lane never reaches STRONG evidence in the auto-build path

next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.title: Arbitrage research protocol
next_bundle_generator_selection_after_up.note: Deterministic logic NOT artificially modified. Operator selects the actual Bundle 10 from report.md `recommended_next_bundle`.

how_it_fits_after_data_source_evaluation: Arbitrage Research Protocol v1 (30dabc4) -> Arbitrage Data Contract v1 (c4d4c8b) -> Arbitrage Dataset Manifest v1 (492fcc1) -> Arbitrage QA Harness Spec v1 (8073bf3) -> Arbitrage Data Source Evaluation Memo v1 (4786390) -> Arbitrage Sample Dataset Plan v1 (this bundle).
Subsequent bundles (Arbitrage Research Readiness Gate, P2 data acquisition, ...) are each separately authorized.
recommended_next_bundle: Arbitrage Research Readiness Gate (written readiness checklist before authorizing the first P2 acquisition; gate spec only, no fetch / no backtest / no execution)
Crypto-D1 Protocol Memo (alternative lane, currently PARKED; new hypothesis required, not a re-tune)
